figures.caption: TABLE I QUANTITATIVE EVALUATION OF TREATMENT PLANNING PERFORMANCE ON INTERNAL AND EXTERNAL COHORTS. EVALUATED BASELINES ARE CATEGORIZED INTO FOUR TYPES: (I) OPEN-SOURCE GENERAL, (II) CLOSED-SOURCE GENERAL, (III) MEDICAL DOMAIN-SPECIFIC, AND (IV) TASK-SPECIFIC MODELS. THE BEST AND SECOND-BEST RESULTS ARE HIGHLIGHTED IN BOLD AND UNDERLINE, RESPECTIVELY.

TABLE II QUANTITATIVE EVALUATION OF FUTURE MRI GENERATION ON INTERNAL AND EXTERNAL COHORTS. RECONSTRUCTION FIDELITY IS MEASURED VIA NMSE (%), PSNR (DB), AND SSIM (×10−2). THE BEST RESULTS ARE HIGHLIGHTED IN BOLD.
